drafts.label: LinkedIn launch note
drafts.body:
Approvals should not die in a spreadsheet tab. We just moved our review loop into WhatsApp so a post can be requested, reviewed, and signed off in the same place the team already responds.

The first version is intentionally small: one draft, one clear decision, one local audit trail. That tiny workflow is enough to make the demo feel real because every reply now leaves a trace we can inspect later.
drafts.cta: Comment "demo" if you want the walkthrough or a copy of the sample workflow.

drafts.label: Short X/Twitter customer proof
drafts.body:
We replaced a fake approval button with a real WhatsApp loop. Draft goes out, reviewer replies approve/edit/reject, and the final decision lands in a local file the team can inspect.

Small demos become credible the moment the workflow survives contact with an actual human reply.
drafts.cta: Want the repo diff? Reply and I will share the implementation notes.
